data.biography:
Ryunosuke Kamiki (nascido em 19 de maio de 1993) é um ator japonês. Ele entrou na indústria em 1995, quando tinha apenas 2 anos. Ele fez sua estreia no drama em "Good News", que lhe rendeu imensa popularidade através de seu primeiro papel em tempo integral como Naoya, interpretando o filho de Masahiro Nakai do SMAP. Em 2001, ele foi descoberto por Hayao Miyazaki e acabou dublando Bao no filme de animação "Spirited Away" do Studio Ghibli, o filme japonês de maior bilheteria no Japão. De 1999 a 2002, ele apareceu em mais de uma dúzia de projetos, o que lhe valeu o título de criança prodígio. Recebeu seu primeiro prêmio por "Backdrop del mio Papá" quando tinha apenas 11 anos. De 2004 a 2020, ganhou prêmios a cada um ou dois anos alternativos.

Hoje, Ryu continua sendo um ator icônico e querido na indústria japonesa. Ele tem a reputação de ser um ator principal confiável que entra no personagem assim que as câmeras começam a rodar. Por sua transição bem-sucedida de ator infantil para protagonista principal, combinada com sua personalidade modesta, fez dele um modelo para muitos. Na hora de escolher as obras, ele gosta de experimentar papéis ou enredos. Ele não se importa muito com popularidade ou em ser o protagonista principal, desde que goste de seu papel. Em vez de “almejar um grande objetivo pela frente”, ele é do tipo que faz o trabalho que tem pela frente de todo o coração.
data.name: Ryunosuke Kamiki

data.biography:
Jennifer Christina Finnigan (born August 22, 1979) is a Canadian actress, best known for her role as Bridget Forrester in the American soap opera The Bold and the Beautiful from 2000 to 2004, for which she won three Daytime Emmy Awards for Outstanding Younger Actress in a Drama Series. She is also known for her roles as Lidia Bennett on the CBC drama Moonshine (2021), Grace Barrows on the CBS sci-fi drama Salvation (2017–2018), Molly Al Fayeed on the FX series Tyrant (2014–2016), Dr. Tina Ridgeway on the medical drama series Monday Mornings (2013), Maddy Putney on the ABC sitcom Better with You (2010–2011), Annabeth Chase on the CBS legal drama Close to Home (2005–2007), Marni Fliss on Committed (2005), and a recurring role in 2004 as Devan Maguire on Crossing Jordan.

She has been married to actor Jonathan Silverman since 2007.
data.name: Jennifer Finnigan

data.biography:
Alice Suki Waterhouse (born 5 January 1992) is an English actress, singer-songwriter and model. Waterhouse portrayed Karen Sirko in the musical drama miniseries Daisy Jones & the Six (2023). She released her debut album I Can't Let Go and the EP Milk Teeth in 2022.

Waterhouse began a career in modelling at the age of 16, and she went on to model for several major fashion labels such as Burberry, Tommy Hilfiger, Laura Mercier and Ferragamo. Her first feature film as an actress was a minor role in Pusher (2012), and she has since appeared in films such as Love, Rosie (2013), The Divergent Series: Insurgent (2015), The Bad Batch (2016), Assassination Nation (2018), and Detective Pikachu (2019).
data.name: Suki Waterhouse

data.biography:
Alice Suki Waterhouse (* 5. Januar 1992 in Hammersmith, London, England) ist ein britisches Model, eine Schauspielerin und Sängerin.

Waterhouse wurde in Hammersmith geboren und wuchs in Chiswick auf. Ihr Vater ist Schönheitschirurg und ihre Mutter Krankenschwester. Sie hat zwei jüngere Schwestern, darunter die Schauspielerin Imogen Waterhouse.

Waterhouse begann ihre Modelkarriere mit 16 Jahren, nachdem sie in einem Pub entdeckt wurde. Als sie 19 war, war ihre erste richtige Kampagne als ein Unterwäschemodel für Marks & Spencer. Sie modelte für Alice & Olivia und für Coast.

Waterhouse war von 2011 bis 2013 mit dem Musiker Miles Kane, von 2013 bis 2015 mit dem Schauspieler Bradley Cooper und von 2016 bis 2017 mit dem Schauspieler Diego Luna zusammen. Seit Mitte 2018 ist sie mit dem Schauspieler Robert Pattinson liiert. Sie wohnen in London.

爱丽丝·苏琪·沃特豪斯（Alice Suki Waterhouse，1992年1月5日-）是一位英国女演员、创作歌手和模特。沃特豪斯在音乐剧迷你剧《黛西·琼斯与六人组》（2023 年）中饰演凯伦·西尔科。她于 2022 年发行了首张专辑《I Can't Let Go》和 EP《Milk Teeth》。

沃特豪斯在16岁时开始了模特生涯，她继续为Burberry，Tommy Hilfiger，Laura Mercier和Ferragamo等几个主要时尚品牌做模特。她作为女演员的第一部故事片是在《推手》（2012 年）中扮演一个小角色，此后她出演了《爱，罗茜》（2013 年）、《分歧者系列：叛乱者》（2015 年）、《坏批次》（2016 年）、《暗杀国度》（2018 年）和《大侦探皮卡丘》（2019 年）。
data.name: 苏琪·沃特豪斯

data.biography:
愛麗絲·蘇琪·沃特豪斯（Alice Suki Waterhouse，1992 年 1 月 5 日-）是一位英國女演員、創作歌手和模特。沃特豪斯在音樂劇迷你劇《黛西·瓊斯與六人組》（2023 年）中飾演凱倫·西爾科。她於 2022 年發行了首張專輯《I Can't Let Go》和 EP《Milk Teeth》。

沃特豪斯在 16 歲時開始了模特生涯，她繼續為 Burberry，Tommy Hilfiger，Laura Mercier 和 Ferragamo 等幾個主要時尚品牌做模特。她作為女演員的第一部故事片是在《推手》（2012 年）中扮演一個小角色，此後她出演了《愛，羅茜》（2013 年）、《分歧者系列：叛亂者》（2015 年）、《壞批次》（2016 年）、《暗殺國度》（2018 年）和《POKÉMON 神探 Pikachu》（2019 年）。

data.biography:
Peter Greene (born Peter Green; October 8, 1965 – December 12, 2025) was an American character actor generally known for portraying villains. He was best known for his roles in the 1994 films The Mask, in which he played the main antagonist Dorian Tyrell, and Pulp Fiction, where he portrayed Zed, a sadistic security guard.

He did not pursue a career in acting until his mid 20s. He initially landed several roles in cinema and television in the early 1990s. His breakthrough came in 1994-1995 with roles in Pulp Fiction, The Mask, Clean, Shaven, and The Usual Suspects. He often played villains such as in Under Siege 2: Dark Territory, Training Day, and martial arts/crime film Fist of the Warrior.

He struggled with heroin and cocaine addiction in the 1990s. He was arrested for drug-related crimes multiple times.

He worked with director Jordan Alan twice. Once on the film Kiss and Tell, a dark comic turn for the actor and then again 4 years later in The Gentleman Bandit (aka Gentleman B). After Greene's arrests in 1998 for drug-related crimes, Alan put the actor through rehab to get him through the second film and eventually, after coming upon Greene doing heroine with Mike Starr, he was forced to replace Greene's voice because of the vocal problems caused by drugs. Despite these problems, Mr. Alan vouched for Greene to producer Tobe Jaffe for the movie Blue Streak, in which he played Martin Lawrence's nemesis.

He continued to mostly work as a character actor. He appeared in the short-lived television drama The Black Donnellys and in the opening scene of the premier of the FX series Justified. He also appeared as a policeman in Prodigy of Mobb Deep's video for "A,B,C's", as well as the focal character in House of Pain's video for "Fed Up".

He died at his Lower East Side apartment in Manhattan, New York City, on December 12, 2025, at the age of 66. In February 2026, the cause of death was declared an accidental self-inflicted gunshot wound to the left axilla causing injury of the brachial artery.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Peter Greene, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia​
data.name: Peter Greene

data.biography:
💥Питер Грин. Родился в 1965-ом году в Монтклере, Нью-Джерси, США. Рос в семье с младшим братом и младшей сестрой. Отец работал водителем грузовика, а мать была домохозяйкой. Учился в Актёрской студии Ли Страсберга в Нью-Йорке. Работал актёром и продюсером. Состоял в отношениях с девушкой, личность которой неизвестна (родился сын Райдер). Питер умер 12-го декабря 2025-го года по не раскрытой причине в возрасте 60-ти лет

🏆Главные награды🏆: Независимый дух (1995) [Маска]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Маска» (1994), «Криминальное чтиво» (1994), «Подозрительные лица» (1995), «Чистилище» (1997), «Тренировочный день» (2001), «Нью-Йорк, я люблю тебя» (2008)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Питер открыто рассказывал о борьбе с зависимостью в 1990-ых и смог вернуться к актёрской карьере после тяжёлого периода жизни

data.biography:
Ana Sophia Heger is a series regular on the CBS television series Life in Pieces (2015). She plays the part of 'Lark Short,' the daughter to main characters 'Greg Short' and 'Jennifer Collins Short,' played respectively by Colin Hanks and Zoe Lister-Jones. The all-star cast includes Dianne Wiest, James Brolin, Jordan Peele, and Betsy Brandt. Ana returns in the upcoming fourth season, slated for April 18th, making her a second season veteran of the show.

She began auditioning for roles at the age of three, with her parents supporting and guiding her. It was at three and a half that Ana landed the prime time role on Life In Pieces.

Ana calls Los Angeles, California her home with her German father, Emmy-Nominated actor Rene Heger, and American mother, actress Emily Rosman Heger. She recently welcomed a newborn brother to their family. Ana is fluent in German and is currently learning Spanish as well as French. When she isn't in preschool or acting, Ana spends her time in ballet and tap-dancing classes, as well as drawing and painting.
data.name: Ana Sophia Heger

data.biography:
Ana Sophia Heger è una presenza fissa nella serie televisiva della CBS Life in Pieces (2015). Interpreta il ruolo di 'Lark Short', la figlia dei personaggi principali 'Greg Short' e 'Jennifer Collins Short', interpretati rispettivamente da Colin Hanks e Zoe Lister-Jones. Il cast di stelle include Dianne Wiest, James Brolin, Jordan Peele e Betsy Brandt. Ana torna nella prossima quarta stagione, prevista per il 18 aprile, diventando così una veterana della seconda stagione della serie.

Ha iniziato a fare audizioni per ruoli all'età di tre anni, con il supporto e la guida dei genitori. Fu a tre anni e mezzo che Ana ottenne il ruolo in prima serata in Life In Pieces.

Ana considera Los Angeles, California, la sua casa con suo padre tedesco, l'attore candidato all'Emmy Rene Heger, e la madre americana, l'attrice Emily Rosman Heger. Recentemente ha accolto un fratello neonato nella loro famiglia. Ana parla fluentemente il tedesco e attualmente sta imparando spagnolo oltre che francese. Quando non è all'asilo o non recita, Ana trascorre il tempo in corsi di balletto e tip tap, oltre a disegnare e dipingere.

data.biography: Arnaud Mimran est un homme d'affaires français. Son nom est lié à plusieurs affaires judiciaires en lien avec le milieu franco-israélien spécialisé dans l'escroquerie et la fraude. Il a été mis en cause dans plusieurs affaires criminelles. En 2017, il est condamné en appel à huit ans de prison ferme pour sa participation à la fraude à la TVA sur les quotas de carbone et il écope en 2021 de treize ans de prison ferme pour son implication dans la séquestration et l'extorsion du trader turco-suisse Yomi Rodrig. Arnaud Mimran, suspecté d'avoir commandité le meurtre de Samy Souied, est mis en examen pour assassinat en 2021.

JoeyStarr, is a French rapper, record producer and actor, from Saint-Denis, Île-de-France. He co-founded the famous French rap band Suprême NTM in 1989 along with Kool Shen. He was born on 27 October 1967.
data.name: JoeyStarr

data.biography:
JoeyStarr, parfois orthographié Joey Starr, nom de scène de Didier Morville, né le 27 octobre 1967 à Saint-Denis (département de la Seine), est un rappeur, producteur et acteur français. Il commence sa carrière musicale en duo avec Kool Shen, sous le nom de groupe Suprême NTM, l'un des piliers du hip-hop français durant les années 1990, devenu inactif en 2001, puis reformé sept ans plus tard en 2008.

Entre 1998 et 2004, Joey et ses disc-jockeys du label B.O.S.S. ont leur propre émission de radio sur Skyrock, appelée Sky.B.O.S.S..

En mai 2005, JoeyStarr fonde, avec Leïla Dixmier, le collectif Devoirs de mémoires.

Depuis 2008, JoeyStarr se consacre majoritairement au cinéma. Il est notamment nommé deux fois au César pour ses rôles dans les films de son ex-compagne Maïwenn: Le Bal des actrices (2009) et Polisse (2011). Il prête également sa voix dans des films non francophones, comme Ted (2012), réalisé par Seth MacFarlane, et sa suite, Ted 2 (2015) dans lequel il double un ours en peluche vivant.

Didier Morville est né à Saint-Denis, dans l'actuel département de la Seine-Saint-Denis, de parents martiniquais; sa mère avait des origines chinoises; sa grand-mère paternelle était une quarteronne blonde. À cinq ans, son père le sépare de force de sa mère. Il ne la reverra que dix-huit ans plus tard. Durant son enfance, il est victime de maltraitance sur mineur par son père violent, autoritaire et incapable d'affection. Encore enfant, il assiste impuissant à la mort violente de son lapin tué par son père qui le cuit et le force à en manger. De lui, il dira plus tard, après la sortie de sa biographie: «Il a des circonstances atténuantes. Aux Antilles, il a dû se battre pour aller à l'école. On lui demandait de ramener de l'argent à la maison, pas des devoirs. Avec moi, pas de dialogue, il avait viré ma mère.» À sa majorité, en 1985, son père l'expulse du domicile familial.

Vivant dans un deux-pièces de la Cité Allende de Saint-Denis, elle-même classée en zone urbaine sensible, son père le rudoie régulièrement depuis des années: «T'arriveras à rien, t'es qu'une merde.» Ces paroles influencent énormément Morville.

Entre l'âge de huit et quinze ans, Didier passe ses vacances dans sa famille aux Antilles, où il s'ennuie le plus clair de son temps.

À douze ans, malgré ses talents pour la rédaction, il décroche scolairement pour redoubler sa sixième et sa cinquième, et entre au pensionnat privé de Meudon, puis de Joinville, pour une longue durée. Il écoute alors de la musique funk, jazz-rock, mais aussi new wave, comme Kraftwerk dont il achète l'album et danse dans la cité, faute de pouvoir entrer en boîte de nuit.

En 1987, il effectue son service militaire en Allemagne à la garnison de Saint-Wendel, au 1er régiment de cuirassiers durant lequel il passe, selon ses termes, «dix-neuf mois d'enfer» et se retrouve plusieurs fois en cellule disciplinaire à la suite de différends liés à ses relations difficiles avec les représentants de l'autorité. Il en éprouve un sentiment de révolte, que l'on peut entendre dans les paroles de la chanson Quelle gratitude de l'album Authentik. ...

Source: Article "JoeyStarr" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

data.biography:
Patrick Galen Dempsey (born January 13, 1966) is an American actor and race car driver. He is best known for his role as neurosurgeon Derek "McDreamy" Shepherd in Grey's Anatomy. He had early success as an actor, starring in a number of films in the 1980s, including Can't Buy Me Love (1987) and Loverboy (1989).

In the 1990s, he mostly appeared in smaller roles in film, such as Outbreak (1995) and television. Dempsey was also in Scream 3 (2000) where he played the role of Detective Mark Kincaid.

He was successful in landing a lead role in Sweet Home Alabama (2002), a surprise box office hit. He has since starred in other films, including Brother Bear 2 (2006), Enchanted (2007), Made of Honor (2008), Valentine's Day (2010), Flypaper (2011), Freedom Writers (2007), Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011), and Bridget Jones's Baby (2016).

Dempsey, who maintains a sports car and vintage car collection, also enjoys auto racing in his spare time. He has competed in pro-am events such as the 24 Hours of Le Mans, Rolex 24 at Daytona sports car race, and Ensenada SCORE Baja 1000 off-road race. Prior to the 2013 24 Hours of Le Mans, Dempsey declared that he would "walk away" from acting if he could and dedicate himself full-time to motorsports.
data.name: Patrick Dempsey

data.biography: Urodził się 13 stycznia 1966 r. w rodzinie irlandzkiego amerykanina, już od najmłodszych lat wykazywał talenty aktorskie. W mlodości występowała jako żongler, magik i klown w cyrkach. Jednak potem zajął się na poważnie aktorstwem, co przyniosło mu kilka dobrych ról. Wystąpił ostatnio w filmie "Dziewczyna z Alabamy", a wcześniej w "Epidemii" i "Krzyku 3".

مثل أمريكي من مواليد 13 يناير 1966، حاصل على جائزة نقابة ممثلي الشاشة 2006 لأفضل مجموعة عن دورهم في المسلسل الدرامي جريز أناتومي، كما رُشح بنفس الدور لجائزة الغولدن غلوب لأفضل ممثل. شارك في

فيلم Transformers : Dark of the Moon[2011] فيلم Brother Bear 2[2006] فيلم The Art of Racing in the Rain[2019] فيلم Freedom Writers[2007] فيلم Valentine's Day[2010].

Patrick Dempsey est un acteur, réalisateur et pilote automobile américain.

Il est notamment célèbre pour le rôle du Dr Derek Shepherd dans la série Grey's Anatomy.

帕特里克·盖伦·登普西（Patrick Galen Dempsey，1966年1月13日-），美国演员、赛车手。他最出名的是他在《实习医生格蕾》中饰演神经外科医生德里克“麦克梦幻”谢泼德。他作为演员取得了早期的成功，在 1980 年代主演了多部电影，包括《不能买我的爱》（1987 年）和《情人男孩》（1989 年）。

在 1990 年代，他主要出演电影中的小角色，例如 Outbreak （1995） 和电视。邓普西还在《惊声尖叫 3》（2000 年）中扮演侦探马克·金凯德的角色。
data.name: 帕特里克·登普西
แพทริค เดมป์ซีย์
パトリック・デンプシー

data.biography:
Patrick Galen Dempsey (* 13. Januar 1966) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler und Rennfahrer. Am bekanntesten ist er für seine Rolle als Neurochirurg Derek „McDreamy“ Shepherd in Grey’s Anatomy. Er hatte schon früh Erfolg als Schauspieler und spielte in den 1980er Jahren in mehreren Filmen mit, darunter Can’t Buy Me Love (1987) und Loverboy (1989).

In den 1990er Jahren trat er hauptsächlich in kleineren Rollen in Filmen wie Outbreak (1995) und im Fernsehen auf. Dempsey war auch in Scream 3 (2000) zu sehen, wo er die Rolle des Detective Mark Kincaid spielte.

Er ergatterte eine Hauptrolle in Sweet Home Alabama (2002), einem überraschenden Kassenschlager. Seitdem hat er in weiteren Filmen mitgespielt, darunter Bärenbrüder 2 (2006), Verwünscht (2007), Made of Honor (2008), Valentinstag (2010), Flypaper (2011), Freedom Writers (2007), Transformers 3 (2011) und Bridget Jones' Baby (2016).

Dempsey, der eine Sportwagen- und Oldtimersammlung besitzt, fährt in seiner Freizeit auch gerne Autorennen. Er hat an Pro-Am-Events wie den 24 Stunden von Le Mans, dem Sportwagenrennen Rolex 24 at Daytona und dem Offroad-Rennen Ensenada SCORE Baja 1000 teilgenommen. Vor den 24 Stunden von Le Mans 2013 erklärte Dempsey, dass er die Schauspielerei „aufgeben“ würde, wenn er könnte, und sich ganz dem Motorsport widmen würde.

Google Übersetzung

派屈克·蓋倫·丹普西（Patrick Galen Dempsey，1966 年 1 月 13 日-），美國演員、賽車手。他最出名的是他在《實習醫生格蕾》中飾演神經外科醫生德里克“麥克夢幻”謝潑德。他作為演員取得了早期的成功，在 1980 年代主演了多部電影，包括《不能買我的愛》（1987 年）和《情人男孩》（1989 年）。

在 1990 年代，他主要出演電影中的小角色，例如 Outbreak （1995） 和電視。鄧普西還在《奪命狂呼 3：終極篇》（2000 年）中扮演偵探馬克·金凱德的角色。
data.name: 派屈克·丹普西

data.biography: Guru Somasundaram is an Indian actor who has appeared in Tamil language films. He made his debut in Thiagarajan Kumararaja's Aaranya Kaandam (2011) winning critical acclaim for his role, before also appearing in Suseenthiran's action film Pandiya Naadu (2013), Karthik Subbaraj's gangster film Jigarthanda (2014) and Raju Murugan's political satire film Joker (2016). He is called Kollywood Christian Bale. Now He is Living in Tiruvannamalai.

data.biography: Richa Shukla Moorjani is an American actress who is best known for her role as Kamala in the Netflix series Never Have I Ever and as Indira Olmstead in the fifth season of American crime drama Fargo.
data.name: Richa Shukla Moorjani

data.biography: Richa 于 2011 年毕业于加利福尼亚大学戴维斯分校（UC Davis），主修传播学，辅修戏剧艺术。在大学期间，她活跃于舞蹈社团，担任表演者和编舞。她从 5 岁起便开始学习印度古典舞 Kathak，深受 Tarangini School of Kathak Dance 的 Srimati Anuradha Nag 教授的影响。她还学习了西方舞蹈和宝莱坞舞蹈。  在职业生涯初期，Richa 曾在多部电视剧中客串出演，包括《The Mindy Project》、《NCIS: Los Angeles》和《9-1-1》。2019 年，她在 Netflix 青春剧《初恋未满》中饰演 Kamala Nandiwadal，成为该剧的主要角色之一。该剧由 Mindy Kaling 主创，讲述了一位印度裔美国少女的成长故事，Richa 的角色是一位在加州理工学院攻读生物学博士的年轻女性。  在 2023 至 2024 年间，Richa 在美国犯罪剧《冰血暴》第五季中饰演 Indira Olmstead。此外，她还参演了科幻剧《异形：地球》（Alien: Earth），并在 2025 年播出。
data.name: 里查·舒克拉·穆尔贾尼

data.biography:
Richa Shukla Moorjani, 26 Mayıs 1989 tarihinde Alameda County, Kaliforniya, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Hindistan kökenli bir ailenin kızı olan Moorjani'nin ebeveynleri, müzisyen ve sanatçı kimlikleriyle tanınan bir ailedir. Sanatla iç içe bir ortamda büyüyen Richa, çok küçük yaşlardan itibaren hem Batı hem de Hint dans formlarına ilgi duydu. Özellikle Kathak adı verilen klasik Hint dansı üzerine yoğun bir eğitim aldı ve bu alanda yetkin bir dansçı haline geldi. Dansın yanı sıra tiyatroya da yönelen Moorjani, Kaliforniya Üniversitesi, Davis'te (UC Davis) Tiyatro ve Dans bölümünde anadal yaparken, İletişim bölümünü de yandal olarak tamamladı.

Oyunculuk kariyerine televizyon dizilerinde konuk oyuncu olarak rol alarak başladı. "The Mindy Project," "NCIS: Los Angeles" ve "9-1-1" gibi popüler yapımlarda küçük roller üstlenerek sektörde deneyim kazandı. Bu dönemde aynı zamanda seslendirme sanatçılığı da yaparak yetenek yelpazesini genişletti.

Ancak Richa Moorjani'yi uluslararası alanda şöhrete kavuşturan rol, Mindy Kaling ve Lang Fisher tarafından yaratılan Netflix'in sevilen komedi dizisi "Never Have I Ever" (2020-2023) oldu. Dizide, Hindistan'dan doktora yapmak için Amerika'ya gelen zeki, disiplinli ve geleneklerine bağlı kuzen Kamala Nandiwadal karakterini canlandırdı. Dört sezon boyunca sergilediği performansla hem eleştirmenlerin hem de izleyicilerin büyük beğenisini kazandı. Kamala karakteri aracılığıyla, modern dünya ile geleneksel değerler arasında denge kurmaya çalışan genç bir kadının yaşadığı zorlukları ve komik anları başarıyla yansıttı.

"Never Have I Ever" dizisinin getirdiği başarının ardından Moorjani, kariyerinde önemli bir adım daha atarak FX kanalında yayınlanan ve büyük beğeni toplayan antoloji dizisi "Fargo"nun beşinci sezonunun (2023-2024) kadrosuna katıldı. Bu dizide canlandırdığı Indira Olmstead karakteriyle dramatik yönünü de sergileyerek oyunculuk yeteneğinin ne kadar geniş bir yelpazeye sahip olduğunu kanıtladı. Richa Shukla Moorjani, hem komedi hem de dramadaki başarılı performanslarıyla Hollywood'da yükselen Hint kökenli Amerikalı aktrisler arasında öne çıkmaktadır.

Richa 於 2011 年畢業於加利福尼亞大學戴維斯分校（UC Davis），主修傳播學，輔修戲劇藝術。在大學期間，她活躍於舞蹈社團，擔任表演者和編舞。她從 5 歲起便開始學習印度古典舞 Kathak，深受 Tarangini School of Kathak Dance 的 Srimati Anuradha Nag 教授的影響。她還學習了西方舞蹈和寶萊塢舞蹈。

在職業生涯初期，Richa 曾在多部電視劇中客串出演，包括《The Mindy Project》、《NCIS: Los Angeles》和《9 - 1 - 1》。2019 年，她在 Netflix 青春劇《初戀未滿》中飾演 Kamala Nandiwadal，成為該劇的主要角色之一。該劇由 Mindy Kaling 主創，講述了一位印度裔美國少女的成長故事，Richa 的角色是一位在加州理工學院攻讀生物學博士的年輕女性。

在 2023 至 2024 年間，Richa 在美國犯罪劇《雪花高離奇命案》第五季中飾演 Indira Olmstead。此外，她還參演了科幻劇《異形：地球》（Alien: Earth），並在 2025 年播出。
data.name: 裏查·舒克拉·穆爾賈尼

data.biography:
Roseanne Park (born 11 February 1997), known mononymously as ROSÉ (로제), is a Korean-New Zealand singer and dancer based in South Korea. Born in New Zealand and raised in Australia, Rosé signed with South Korean label YG Entertainment following a successful audition in 2012 and trained for four years before debuting as a member of the girl group Blackpink in August 2016.

In March 2021, ROSÉ made her solo debut with her single album R. Its lead single "On the Ground" was a commercial success, peaking in the top five domestically and becoming the highest-charting song by a Korean female soloist on the US Billboard Hot 100, the ARIA Singles Chart and the UK Singles Chart. It was the first song by a Korean solo artist to top the Billboard Global 200 and the most-viewed music video in 24 hours on YouTube by a solo K-pop artist, which earned ROSÉ two Guinness World Records. The album's second single "Gone" peaked in the top ten in South Korea as well.

In 2024, she signed a management contract with The Black Label. ROSÉ has been acknowledged for her role in fashion as a global ambassador for Yves Saint Laurent, and became the first female Korean idol to attend the Met Gala in 2021.
data.name: ROSÉ

data.biography:
Roseanne Park（1997年2月11日-），单名Rosé（韩语：로제），是居住在韩国的韩裔新西兰歌手和舞者。Rosé出生于新西兰，在澳大利亚长大，在2012年试镜成功后与韩国唱片公司YG娱乐签约，并接受了四年的训练，然后于2016年8月作为女子组合Blackpink的成员出道。

2021 年 3 月，Rosé 以单曲专辑 R 首次亮相。这张专辑在发行的第一周就售出了448,089张，是韩国女独奏家的最高销量。其主打单曲《On the Ground》取得了商业上的成功，在国内排名前五，并成为美国Billboard Hot 100、ARIA单曲榜和英国单曲榜上韩国女独唱歌手的最高排行榜歌曲。这是韩国独唱艺人第一首登上 Billboard 全球 200 强的歌曲，也是 K-pop 独唱艺人在 YouTube 上 24 小时内观看次数最多的音乐视频，为 Rosé 赢得了两项吉尼斯世界纪录。这张专辑的第二首单曲《Gone》在韩国也进入了前十名。
data.name: 朴彩英

data.biography: Park Chae-young, thường được biết đến với nghệ danh Rosé là nữ ca sĩ, người mẫu, nhạc sĩ người New Zealand gốc Hàn Quốc, thành viên của nhóm nhạc nữ Blackpink do YG Entertainment thành lập và quản lý

Roseanne Park（1997 年 2 月 11 日-），單名 Rosé（韓語：로제），是居住在韓國的韓裔紐西蘭歌手和舞者。Rosé出生於紐西蘭，在澳大利亞長大，在 2012 年試鏡成功後與韓國唱片公司 YG 娛樂簽約，並接受了四年的訓練，然後於 2016 年 8 月作為女子組合 Blackpink 的成員出道。

2021 年 3 月，Rosé 以單曲專輯 R 首次亮相。這張專輯在發行的第一週就售出了 448, 089 張，是韓國女獨奏家的最高銷量。其主打單曲《On the Ground》取得了商業上的成功，在國內排名前五，併成為美國 Billboard Hot 100、ARIA 單曲榜和英國單曲榜上韓國女獨唱歌手的最高排行榜歌曲。這是韓國獨唱藝人第一首登上 Billboard 全球 200 強的歌曲，也是 K - pop 獨唱藝人在 YouTube 上 24 小時內觀看次數最多的音樂視頻，為 Rosé 贏得了兩項吉尼斯世界紀錄。這張專輯的第二首單曲《Gone》在韓國也進入了前十名。
data.name: 樸彩英

data.overview: Hộc Châu Phu Nhân xoay quanh cô gái trẻ tên Hải Thị. Trong một cuộc tàn sát, cô may mắn được Giao Nhân cứu sống, về sau được Phương Chư cưu mang. Khi trưởng thành, cô trở thành hộ vệ của Đế Húc và dần chiếm được sự quan tâm của vị hoàng đế này. Giữa Phương Chư và Đế Húc, ai sẽ là người chiếm được trái tim cô?

data.biography:
Babou Ceesay, 1979 yılında Londra, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiş, Gambiya kökenli bir aktördür. Hayatının ilk yıllarını ailesinin memleketi olan Batı Afrika'da geçiren Ceesay, daha sonra eğitim ve kariyer için İngiltere'ye döndü. Oyunculuk kariyerine giden yolu oldukça farklı bir rotadan çizen Ceesay, başlangıçta bilim alanında bir kariyer hedefledi. Imperial College London'da Mikrobiyoloji bölümünden mezun oldu ve bir süre PricewaterhouseCoopers'ta denetçi olarak çalıştı. Ancak içindeki oyunculuk tutkusu ağır basınca, kariyerinde radikal bir değişiklik yaparak Oxford School of Drama'da eğitim almaya karar verdi.

Profesyonel oyunculuk kariyerine tiyatro sahnesinde başlayan Ceesay, kısa sürede İngiltere'nin en saygın sahnelerinde yeteneğini kanıtladı. Özellikle Royal Shakespeare Company ve National Theatre gibi prestijli kurumlarda sahneye çıkarak klasik ve modern oyunlarda önemli roller üstlendi. Sahnedeki disiplini ve güçlü yorumu, ona eleştirmenlerin takdirini kazandırdı ve kamera önü projeleri için sağlam bir temel oluşturdu.

Televizyon kariyerine "Casualty", "Silent Witness" ve "Lewis" gibi popüler İngiliz dizilerinde konuk oyuncu olarak başladı. Onu daha geniş kitlelere tanıtan ilk önemli rollerinden biri, Ken Follett'in aynı adlı romanından uyarlanan ve büyük ses getiren mini dizi "Pillars of the Earth"de (2010) canlandırdığı John Hallam karakteri oldu. Ancak kariyerindeki en büyük çıkışı ve eleştirel başarıyı, 2016 yapımı "Damilola, Our Loved Boy" adlı TV filmiyle yakaladı. Gerçek bir hikayeden uyarlanan filmde, öldürülen oğullarının acısıyla mücadele eden baba Richard Taylor'ı canlandırdı. Bu dokunaklı ve güçlü performansı ona En İyi Erkek Oyuncu dalında BAFTA adaylığı getirdi ve onu İngiltere'nin en yetenekli aktörlerinden biri olarak tescilledi.

Bu başarının ardından "Into the Badlands" (2018-2019) dizisindeki Pilgrim rolüyle uluslararası tanınırlığını artırdı. Ayrıca "'71" (2014), J.J. Abrams'ın yapımcılığını üstlendiği "Overlord Operasyonu" (Overlord) (2018) ve "Hırsızlar Kralı" (King of Thieves) (2018) gibi sinema filmlerinde de önemli rollerde yer aldı. 2021 yılında, kendine özgü bir adli patolog olan Wolfe Kinteh'i canlandırdığı "Wolfe" dizisiyle başroldeki başarısını sürdürdü. Son dönemde ise İkinci Dünya Savaşı'nı konu alan "We Were the Lucky Ones" (2024) ve Keira Knightley ile başrolü paylaştığı gerilim dizisi "Black Doves" (2024) gibi önemli yapımlarda yer alarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.

Gitanjali Rao is an Indian theatre actress, animator and film maker.

Rao is a Bachelor of Fine Art from Sir J.J.Institute of Applied Art, Bombay. She learnt Animation and film making on the job. Her four independently produced animated shorts, Blue, Orange, Printed Rainbow, Chai and TrueLoveStory have been to over 150 International film festivals and received more than 30 awards.
data.name: Gitanjali Rao

data.biography:
Gitanjali Rao 是印度戏剧女演员、动画师和电影制片人。

Rao是孟买J.J.爵士应用艺术学院的美术学士学位。她在工作中学习了动画和电影制作。她独立制作的四部动画短片《蓝色》、《橙色》、《印刷彩虹》、《柴》和《真爱故事》已参加150多个国际电影节，并获得了30多个奖项。
data.name: 吉塔姜利·饶

data.biography:
吉塔姜利·饒 是印度戲劇女演員、動畫師和電影制片人。

Rao 是孟買 J.J. 爵士應用藝術學院的美術學士學位。她在工作中學習了動畫和電影制作。她獨立制作的四部動畫短片《藍色》、《橙色》、《印刷彩虹》、《柴》和《真愛故事》已參加 150 多個國際電影節，並獲得了 30 多個獎項。

data.biography:
Bradley Darryl „B. D.“ Wong (* 24. Oktober 1960 in San Francisco, Kalifornien) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler und Synchronsprecher.  Wong ist bekannt für seine Rollen als Dr. George Huang in der Fernsehserie Law & Order: Special Victims Unit, Father Ray Mukada in Oz – Hölle hinter Gittern, Ngawang Jigmê in dem Film Sieben Jahre in Tibet und als Dr. Henry Wu in den Filmen Jurassic Park, Jurassic World und Jurassic World: Das gefallene Königreich.

Quelle: Wikipedia

Bradley Darryl «BD» Wong (San Francisco, California, 24 de octubre de 1960) es un actor estadounidense, conocido por sus papeles como el Dr. George Huang en Law & Order: Special Victims Unit, como el Padre Ray Mukada en Oz, Henry Wu en la película Jurassic Park, y por su papel recurrente como Song Liling en M. Butterfly.

Wong nació en San Francisco, California, hijo de Roberta Christine (de soltera Leong), una supervisora de una compañía telefónica, y William D. Wong. Es de origen chino. Wong asistió Lincoln High School antes de asistir a la Universidad Estatal de San Francisco.

Descripción anterior del artículo de Wikipedia BD Wong, con licencia CC-BY-SA 3.0 ES, lista completa de colaboradores en Wikipedia.

美国华裔演员，因主演《蝴蝶君》而获得托尼奖最佳男主角[1]。也参与过剧集《法律与秩序：特殊受害者》，《监狱风云》，《异度觉醒》[2]和电影《侏罗纪世界》，《新岳父大人》和《世纪的哭泣》等的演出。此外在电影《西藏七年》中扮演阿沛·阿旺晋美，也参与一些配音和舞台剧工作。

黄荣亮出生于加州旧金山，父亲是一家电话公司的主管。他具有华人血统。毕业于旧金山州立大学。

1988年黄荣亮开始与人才代理Richie Jackson的长期伴侣关系。2000年，两人有了一对双胞胎儿子：Boaz Dov（出生后90分钟即去世），Jackson Foo Wong。他们是通过代孕母亲，用黄的精子和Jackson姐姐的卵子结合所生。2003年，黄写了一本关于这段经历的回忆录。黄和Jackson于2004年结束了他们的关系。

黄荣亮也花时间和资源为一些与LGBT和艺术有关的慈善机构作出帮助。
data.name: 黄荣亮

data.biography: Né le 24 octobre 1960 à San Francisco, Californie, BD Wong est un acteur américain d’origine chinoise, reconnu pour sa polyvalence au théâtre, au cinéma et à la télévision. Il débute sur Broadway, remportant un Tony Award pour son rôle dans M. Butterfly (1988). Au cinéma, il incarne le Dr Henry Wu dans la saga Jurassic Park (1993, 2015-2022) et apparaît dans Seven Years in Tibet (1997). À la télévision, il est célèbre pour son rôle du Dr George Huang dans New York, unité spéciale (2001-2015), ainsi que pour ses performances dans Oz (1997-2003) et Mr. Robot (2015-2019). Wong prête aussi sa voix à Li Shang dans Mulan (1998). Salué pour son talent, il reste une figure influente du divertissement.

美國華裔演員，因主演《蝴蝶君》而獲得託尼獎最佳男主角。也參與過劇集《法律與秩序：特殊受害者》，《監獄風雲》，《異度覺醒》和電影《侏羅紀世界》，《新嶽父大人》和《世紀的哭泣》等的演出。此外在電影《西藏七年》中扮演阿沛·阿旺晉美，也參與一些配音和舞台劇工作。

黃榮亮出生於加州舊金山，父親是一家電話公司的主管。他具有華人血統。畢業於舊金山州立大學。

1988 年黃榮亮開始與人才代理 Richie Jackson 的長期伴侶關係。2000 年，兩人有了一對雙胞胎兒子：Boaz Dov（出生後 90 分鐘即去世），Jackson Foo Wong。他們是透過 透過 透過 透過 透過 通過代孕母親，用黃的精子和 Jackson 姐姐的卵子結合所生。2003 年，黃寫了一本關於這段經歷的回憶錄。黃和 Jackson 於 2004 年結束了他們的關係。

黃榮亮也花時間和資源為一些與 LGBT 和藝術有關的慈善機構作出幫助。
data.name: 黃榮亮

data.overview: Lấy bối cảnh tại thị trấn Blithe Hollow (một địa danh hư cấu), ParaNorman kể về cậu bé 11 tuổi Norman Babcock. Khác với những đứa trẻ khác, Norman dành phần lớn thời gian cho phim kinh dị và nghiên cứu về các truyền thuyết ma quỷ. Trên thực tế, cậu bé còn là người có khả năng trò chuyện với người chết. Một ngày nọ, người chú kỳ quặc Prenderghast tìm đến Norman và cho cậu biết lời nguyền phù thủy yểm vào thị trấn cách đây 300 năm sắp linh nghiệm. Chỉ có Norman là người duy nhất ngăn chặn được hiểm họa từ lời nguyền này. Sử dụng giác quan thứ sáu, cậu bé 11 tuổi chạm tới những giới hạn của tận cùng thế giới bên kia.
data.tagline: Cẩn thận! La hét ầm ĩ phía trước.
data.title: Norman & Giác Quan Thứ Sáu

data.biography:
Ashley Nicole Rickards (born May 4, 1992, height 5' 3¾" (1,62 m)) is an American actress, known for her role in MTV's Awkward as Jenna Hamilton, and as Samantha "Sam" Walker, a troubled young girl taken in by Brooke Davis who becomes her foster-mother, in The CW teen drama series One Tree Hill. She also starred in the 2011 independent drama film Fly Away as Mandy, a severely autistic girl.

Rickards grew up on a horse farm that catered for children with special needs. She attended a local Montessori school where, at age 13, she had her first taste of acting in an opera production. Rickards graduated from high school at age fifteen and is a member of Mensa. After attending a local talent showcase, organized by Lou Perlman, Rickards traveled to Los Angeles where she eventually gathered a team of representatives. Upon graduating, Rickards began to appear in a number of minor roles, as child labor laws restricted the number of hours she was able to work. After making a number of guest appearances and shorts, she landed the role of Samantha Walker, a runaway foster child, in One Tree Hill for the 2008-2009 season. Although not aware of the show before auditioning, Rickards found that she "learned so much from acting techniques to different ways of shooting things".Her character did not return the following season, while in the same year she had a bit part in her first feature film, Gamer.

Rickards spent much of 2009 attending auditions while a proposed lead-role in the film Dirty Girl fell through. In 2010 she appeared opposite Jimmy Smits in an episode of the legal drama Outlaw while she also auditioned for the lead-role in Awkward. Initially rejected, her manager Adam Griffin sent the producers a tape Rickards had made for Fly Away "to show how she can do anything". The actress landed both roles and filmed the pilot for the MTV series prior to Fly Away, a feature where she played a severely autistic girl.

A former competitive equestrian, she helped to launch the Project Futures Somaly Mam Foundation (2011), which works to prevent and end human trafficking and sexual slavery in Southeast Asia. Rickards writes poetry, scripts, and enjoys painting in her spare time. She also appeared in The Fray's video for "How to Save a Life", and also in The Format's video for "She Doesn't Get It".
data.name: Ashley Rickards

data.biography: Emma Hamilton (actress) was born in 1984 in Melbourne, Victoria, Australia and is a graduate of the Royal Academy of Dramatic Art. She is known for The Cold Light of Day (2012), Into the Storm (2009) and The Tudors (2007). data.biography: Mercedes Mason (credited by birth name Masöhn until 2014) is a Swedish-American actress and former model. She is known for playing the role of Zondra in the television series Chuck, and Isabel Zambada in the procedural drama The Finder. She also starred in the 2011 American horror film Quarantine 2: Terminal, portrayed Louise Leonard in the supernatural drama series 666 Park Avenue (2012–2013), played Talia Del Campo in NCIS: Los Angeles, and was a regular on AMC's television series Fear the Walking Dead from 2015 to 2017. In 2018 she played Captain Zoe Andersen in ABC Police crime drama The Rookie.
data.name: Mercedes Mason

data.biography:
刘天佐，原沈阳军区某部文工团演员班长，曾多次参加全军文艺汇演，并取得奖项。2002年底退伍，考入中央戏剧学院成人教育学院。

2006年在青春励志剧《士兵突击》中饰演老魏一角被人们关注，2008年主演战争题材电视剧《我的团长我的团》，2009年参演电视剧《生死线》饰演窦六品，2011年在都市情感题材剧《裸婚时代》饰演冬瓜被人们熟识，2013年参演微电影《告别囧途》。2014年5月主演都市爱情喜剧电影《拆散专家》，9月参演超级季播剧《盗墓笔记》饰演胖子。2016年参演杨亚洲导演的电视剧《嘿，孩子》，2020年主演检察法治剧《巡回检察组》。
data.name: 刘天佐

data.biography:
Aslen Trabzon'un Çaykara ilçesinin Koldere köyündendir. Babası saatçilik yaptığı için Çaykara’dan Ağrı'ya gitmiştir ve bu yüzden orada doğmuştur. Daha sonra Sakarya'ya yerleşmişlerdir. Çocukluğu burada geçmiştir. İlk ve ortaokulu burada tamamlamıştır. Ortaöğrenim mezunu olan sanatçı, Dostlar Tiyatrosu, BKM Oyuncuları gibi topluluklarda, sinema filmlerinde ve dizilerde oynamaktadır. Tolga Çevik'le birlikte Komedi Dükkanı adlı eğlence programında rol almış, daha sonra başka projeler nedeniyle bu programdan ayrılmıştır.

Tiyatro yapmaya 1964 yılında başlamış, kariyerinin başında 20 yıl kadar çocuk oyunları yazmış, yönetmiş ve oynamıştır. Verdiği bir röportajda sinema filmlerinde fazla rol almaması hakkındaki bir soru üzerine "Ben 1964 yılında Ankara Sanat Tiyatrosu'nda profesyonel oyunculuğa başladım, yani 44 yıl önce. Tiyatro oyuncusu olarak İstanbul'a geldiğim zaman, sinema yapma aşkıyla hep setlere gider, uzaktan çalışmaları izlerdim. Her izlediğimde de hâlime şükredip geri dönerdim. Setlere gittiğim zaman hayalini kurduğum sinemanın o sinema olmadığını gördüm çünkü." demiştir.
data.name: Salih Kalyon

data.biography: Tony Shalhoub is an American actor. His television work includes the role of Antonio Scarpacci on Wings and Adrian Monk on Monk. He has won three Emmy Awards and a Golden Globe for his work on Monk. He also has a successful career as a character actor, with roles in Spy Kids, Men in Black, Men in Black II, Galaxy Quest, 1408, Barton Fink, Big Night, The Siege, and The Man Who Wasn't There.​
data.name: Tony Shalhoub

data.biography:
Anthony Marcus Shalhoub est né le 9 octobre 1953 à Green Bay, dans le Wisconsin. Il devient alors le cadet d'une fratrie de dix enfants1. Son père, Joe Shalhoub originaire du Liban, immigre à l'âge de dix ans vers les États-Unis alors qu'il est orphelin. Il épouse ensuite la mère de Tony, Helen, qui fait partie de la deuxième génération d'arabes américains. Le couple crée une chaîne d'épicerie familiale. Leur premier magasin se situe au centre-ville de Green Bay.

Les années passent et le jeune Tony est admis au théâtre grâce à sa sœur aînée, qui s'est permis d'inscrire son nom sur une liste d'extras dans une production de la comédie musicale Le Roi et moi. Bien qu'il se soit trouvé du mauvais côté du rideau lors de la répétition finale, il devient tout de suite dépendant au théâtre. Par la suite, Shalhoub est diplômé de la Green Bay East High School, école où ses camarades le désignent comme étant « le mieux habillé » et le plus susceptible de réussir. Mais dans ses années d'études, il subit un revers et se casse une jambe en tombant dans la fosse lors d'une répétition. Récupérant rapidement, Tony est quand même en mesure d'exécuter la pièce de théâtre de fin d'année jouée à l'école. Parmi ses autres diplômes, il obtient également un baccalauréat en art dramatique à l'Université de Southern Maine située à Portland, avant se voir décerner un certificat de maîtrise en drame de la part de la Yale School of Drama en 1980.

Энтони Маркус Шалуб - американский актёр. Лауреат четырёх премий «Эмми», а также «Тони» и «Золотого глобуса». Наиболее известен по ролям в сериалах «Крылья» (1991-1997), «Детектив Монк» (2002-2009) и «Удивительная миссис Мейзел» (2017-2023). Известность Шалубу также принесли роли в фильмах «Бартон Финк» (1991), «Большая ночь» (1996), «Люди в чёрном» (1997), «Поли» (1998), «Осада» (1998), «В поисках Галактики» (1999), «Дети шпионов» (2001), «Тринадцать привидений» (2001), «Человек, которого не было» (2001) и «1408» (2007).
data.name: Тони Шалуб

data.biography:
Anthony Marcus Shalhoub 1953. október 9-én született a wisconsini Green Bay-ben. Gyermekkora nagy részét is itt töltötte. Édesapja libanoni származású, édesanyja hasonlóképpen, csak ő már Amerikában született. Kilenc testvére van, közülük Susan és Dan szintén színészek.

Mindössze hat éves volt, amikor először állt színpadon egy iskolai darab keretein belül: A király és én (1959). Rövid ideig hallgatója volt a University of Wisconsinnak, majd átigazolt a University of Southern Maine-re, ahol drámatagozaton diplomázott 1977-ben. Mesterképzésen a Yale School of Drama falain belül vett részt, s 1980-ban vehette át oklevelét.

A mesterség alapjait a Massachusetts-i American Repertory Theatre társulati tagjaként sajátította el, majd Broadway előadásokban ért el sikereket. Itt ismerte meg későbbi feleségét, Brooke Adams-et, akivel 1992-ben házasodtak össze. A kapcsolatból egy lány született: Sophie (1993).

Első filmszerepét a Féltékenység (1986) című vígjátékban kapta, majd az Egyedül a neondzsungelben (1988) című alkotásban jutott szereplési lehetőséghez. Felbukkant a Bill Murray főszereplésével készült Viszem a bankot (1990) és a James Caan, Nicolas Cage és Sarah Jessica Parker trióval színre vitt Nászút Vegasba (1992) című vígjátékokban is.

Tim Robbinsszal és Meg Ryannel dolgozott együtt az I.Q. – A szerelem relatív (1994) című romantikus alkotásban, majd Gena Rowlands főszereplőtársa volt a Paulie (1998) című családi vígjátékban. Arthur Kriticos családapa szerepében találkozhattunk vele a 13 kísértet (2001) című horrorban, majd elnyerte talán pályája legjelentősebb karakterének megformálási jogát: Adrian Monk, a fóbiáitól és kényszerbetegségétől erősen korlátolt, ám briliáns elmével és megfigyelőkészséggel megáldott nyomozó bőrébe bújt a Monk – Flúgos nyomozó (2002) című tévésorozat nyolc évadán keresztül. Alakításáért többször tüntették ki Emmy- és Golden Globe-díjjal.

Jack Jeebsként jelent meg a Men in Black – Sötét zsaruk első és második részében (1997, 2002), majd Nicole Kidman és Clive Owen oldalán játszott a Hemingway és Gelhorn (2012) című romantikus filmdrámában, mely Ernest Hemingway életútját követi nyomon. Utolsó munkái közé tartozik Victor Kershaw megformálása Mark Wahlberg és Ed Harris társaságában a Pain & Gain (2013) című akciófilmben.
美国演员。他的电视作品包括《翅膀》中的安东尼奥·斯卡帕奇和《僧侣》中的阿德里安·蒙克。他因在《僧侣》中的工作而获得了三项艾美奖和一项金球奖。作为角色演员，他也拥有成功的职业生涯，在《间谍小子》、《黑衣人》、《黑衣人 II》、《银河探索》、《1408》、《巴顿芬克》、《大夜》、《围攻》和《不在那儿的人》中扮演角色。
data.name: 托尼·夏尔赫布

data.biography: Tony Shalhoub, właśc. Anthony Marcus Shalhoub (ur. 9 października 1953 w Green Bay) – amerykański aktor telewizyjny, filmowy i teatralny, także scenarzysta i producent filmowy pochodzenia libańskiego. Międzynarodową rozpoznawalność zdobył dzięki kreacji cierpiącego na szereg fobii detektywa Adriana Monka w serialu USA Network Detektyw Monk i jako Antonio Scarpacci z sitcomu NBC Skrzydła.

Anthony Marcus "Tony" Shalhoub (9 de octubre de 1953) es un actor y productor estadounidense, ganador de cuatro premios Emmy y un Globo de Oro.

En televisión, fue el protagonista y productor ejecutivo de la serie estadounidense Monk, donde interpretaba a Adrian Monk, un detective que padece un trastorno obsesivo-compulsivo y también ha interpretado a Abe Weissman en la serie The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel, por la que recibió un premio Emmy. Antes había destacado por su papel de taxista italiano en la serie norteamericana de la NBC Wings, en la que intervino desde 1991 hasta 1997.

Shalhoub ha tenido también una exitosa carrera cinematográfica, con papeles en películas como Quick Change (1990), Barton Fink (1991), Big Night (1996), Hombres de negro, Gattaca (ambas de 1997), Paulie, The Siege (ambas de 1998), Héroes fuera de órbita (1999), Spy Kids, Thirteen Ghosts, The Man Who Wasn't There (todas de 2001) y 1408 (2007).

Ha sido ampliamente reconocido por su trabajo, ha ganado un Globo de Oro al Mejor Actor de Serie de Televisión Musical o de Comedia, seis Screen Actors Guild Awards y cuatro Primetime Emmy Awards. Por su trabajo teatral en el circuito de Broadway, Shalhoub obtuvo un [[Premios Tony|premio Tony al mejor actor de musical por su interpretación de Tewfiq Zakaria en The Band's Visit. También ha puesto voz a la franquicia Cars (2006-2017), Tortugas Ninja (2014) y Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016).
美國演員。他的電視作品包括《翅膀》中的安東尼奧·斯卡帕奇和《僧侶》中的阿德裏安·蒙克。他因在《僧侶》中的工作而獲得了三項艾美獎和一項金球獎。作為角色演員，他也擁有成功的職業生涯，在《間諜小子》、《黑超特警組》、《黑衣人 II》、《銀河探索》、《1408》、《巴頓芬克》、《大夜》、《圍攻》和《不在那兒的人》中扮演角色。
data.name: 託尼·夏爾赫布

data.overview: Một đặc nhiệm Trung Quốc nhận nhiệm vụ bảo vệ nhà khoa học tài ba khỏi sự săn lùng của tổ chức tội phạm nguy hiểm. Trong suốt thời gian bên cạnh nhà khoa học, ông dần phát hiện những góc khuất mờ ám trong chương trình nghiên cứu của nhà khoa học này, trong số đó đặc biệt nhất là chương trình chế tạo ra cô gái mang trái tim thép. Liệu đây chỉ là một thí nghiệm y học bình thường hay nó là mầm mống của một loại vũ khí mới?
data.title: Quả Tim Thép

data.biography: Guo Yang, anteriormente conhecido como Guo Ying, nasceu na cidade de Dazhou, província de Sichuan, em 7 de agosto de 1988. Ele é uma atriz de cinema e televisão e cantor pop na China continental e se formou no Departamento de Performance da Academia Central de Drama.
郭泱，原名郭映，内地影视女演员、 流行乐歌手，毕业于中央戏剧学院表演系。2004年参加湖南卫视超级女声，获得成都赛区第五名；2019年，饰演周星驰最新贺岁电影《新喜剧之王》。
郭泱，原名郭映，內地影視女演員、 流行樂歌手，畢業於中央戲劇學院表演系。2004 年參加湖南衞視超級女聲，獲得成都賽區第五名；2019 年，飾演周星馳最新賀歲電影《新喜劇之王》。

data.biography: Ram Kapoor (born 1 September 1973) is an Indian television actor noted particularly for his portrayal of Jai Walia on the Zee TV serial, Kasamh Se. He is the only actor to win the Indian Telly Awards for best actor consecutively (in 2006, 2007 and 2008). Though Kapoor has received recognition and acclaim for his work in television, he is generally perceived as someone who shows an attitude and exhibits tantrums on shooting sets. He has acted in five Hindi movies in supporting cast roles.
data.name: Ram Kapoor

data.biography: 拉姆·卡普尔（Ram Kapoor，1973 年 9 月 1 日出生）是一位印度电视演员，因在 Zee 电视连续剧《Kasamh Se》中饰演 Jai Walia 而闻名。他是唯一一位连续获得印度泰利奖最佳男主角奖的演员（2006年、2007年和2008年）。尽管卡普尔因其在电视上的工作而获得了认可和赞誉，但他通常被认为是一个在拍摄现场表现出态度和发脾气的人。他曾在五部印地语电影中担任配角。
data.name: 拉姆·卡普尔

data.biography: 拉姆·卡普爾（Ram Kapoor，1973 年 9 月 1 日出生）是一位印度電視演員，因在 Zee 電視聯續劇《Kasamh Se》中飾演 Jai Walia 而聞名。他是唯一一位聯續獲得印度泰利獎最佳男主角獎的演員（2006 年、2007 年和 2008 年）。盡管卡普爾因其在電視上的工作而獲得了認可和贊譽，但他通常被認為是一個在拍攝現場表現出態度和發脾氣的人。他曾在五部印地語電影中擔任配角。
data.name: 拉姆·卡普爾

data.biography:
Aurélia Petit (18 April 1971) is a French actress. In the year 1984, Petit began her theater career. For a year, she went to theater school with the famous Niels Arestrup. Since 1993, she has been seen in French television shows and movies. In 2006 she played the clerk Martine in the film The Science of Sleep by Michel Gondry.

Source: Article "Aurélia Petit" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.
data.name: Aurélia Petit

data.biography:
Aurélia Petit, née le 18 avril 1971, est une actrice française.

Aurélia Petit a commencé le théâtre en 1984 avec Turbulences, mise en scène par Gilberte Tsaï au TEP, suivi de Voyage en Chine intérieure, toujours mise en scène Gilberte Tsaï. Après une année à l'École du passage de Niels Arestrup, elle fait du théâtre de rue, cabaret, et part avec le cirque Archaos. Suivront plusieurs spectacles avec divers metteurs en scènes et chorégraphe tel que Gérard Desarthe, Christophe Salengro, Jérôme Bel et Philippe Decouflé (dont elle est assistante dramaturge sur la création Sombrero). Aurélia Petit est connue également pour participer, depuis la fin des années 1990, à l'émission Groland comme mannequin dans la parodie de télé-shopping.

Elle fait la rencontre du réalisateur Cédric Klapisch avec lequel elle travaille à des ateliers d'écriture qui serviront de base pour définir les personnages du film Chacun cherche son chat (1996). Cette rencontre lui permet de s'orienter vers une carrière au cinéma.

Aurélia Petit est l'auteur, avec Lazare Boghossian — son compagnon à la ville —, et la metteuse en scène de La Cage aux blondes et de Prologue, spectacles qu’elle joue au Théâtre national de Chaillot. Un livre, Chemin de râteaux, est édité chez Orbis Pictus Club.

Source: Article "Aurélia Petit" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Kevin Davey is a British Canadian film and television actor, stunt performer and stunt coordinator, and martial artist and jiu-jitsu instructor. He decided to pursue his dream of acting professionally after his wife Linda was killed by a drunk driver in April 2008 in the Calgary community of Bridlewood.
data.name: Kevin Davey

data.biography: Ty Glaser is an English actress, known for her role as Dr. Gemma Wilde on the BBC drama series Holby City. She has also appeared in numerous television series, such as Secret Diary of a Call Girl, Above Suspicion, The Bill and Emmerdale as Libby Charles. In 2019, she appeared in the Channel 4 drama series Ackley Bridge as Sian Oakes.
data.name: Ty Glaser

data.biography: 2013年张欣源因在《红狐行动》中饰演二姨太 [3]，同年还参演了电视剧《紫钗奇缘》 [4]；2014年张欣源参演了电视剧《新济公活佛》 [5]。2015年在电视剧《戴流苏耳环的少女》 [6]饰演谷雨。2017年张欣源出演了院线电影《老公去哪了》 [7]。2018年，张欣源在青春校园题材网络大电影《我的艺术老师》担任女主。2021年6月18日，出演的电影《蛇之女》上映。
data.name: 张欣源

data.biography: 2013 年張欣源因在《紅狐行動》中飾演二姨太 ，同年還參演了電視劇《紫釵奇緣》 ；2014 年張欣源參演了電視劇《新濟公活佛》 。2015 年在電視劇《戴流蘇耳環的少女》 飾演穀雨。2017 年張欣源出演了院線電影《老公去哪了》 。2018 年，張欣源在青春校園題材網絡大電影《我的藝術老師》擔任女主。2021 年 6 月 18 日，出演的電影《蛇之女》上映。

data.biography:
Chelsey was born and raised in Phoenix, Arizona. At age 18, she moved to Los Angeles to attend the American Academy of Dramatic Arts. After graduating, she studied Shakespeare at the British American Drama Academy in Oxford, England. Since then, she has continued her studies with Steppenwolf West, Stan Kirsch Studios, Carolyne Barry Creative and the Upright Citizen's Brigade.

She loves improvisation and performs in several troupes in LA. She also enjoys travel and has been to Canada, Mexico, Europe and Asia. In 2010, she spent the year living in South East Asia as a Show Director for Universal Studios Singapore.
data.name: Chelsey Crisp

data.biography:
Ивайло Йорданов Герасков е български актьор.

Роден е на 17 февруари 1954 г. във Варна. Завършва ВИТИЗ „Кръстьо Сарафов“ със специалност актьорско майсторство за драматичен театър в класа на професор Елка Михайлова през 1979 г. След това започва да работи в Драматичния театър във Враца, а от 1982 г. е в трупата на Театър „София“.

Герасков е играл в постановките „Доходно място“, „Филоктет“, „Ивона – принцеса Бургундска“, „Соната на призраци“, „Кралят Слънце“, „Игра на Едип“, „При закрити врати“, „В полите на Витоша“, „Самотата на памуковите полета“, „Нощта на боговете“, „Нора“ и други.

Играе в пиесите „Покана за вечеря“, „Нощта на 16-и януари“ и „Вълните“.

Награди  Наградата за най-добра мъжка роля за филма „Вик за помощ“ на фестивала във Варна.

谷祖琳（Jo Koo，1977年05月16日—），香港电影演员及歌手，被导演陈果发掘而入行，曾推出过一张唱片及参与拍摄多部电影，早年更为叱吒903电台主持节目《绝情谷》。主要作品有《法网群英》、《南北大状》等。

data.biography: Anatole Taubman was born in Zurich, Switzerland and is of Russian-Polish-Slovakian-Austrian-and-former-East-Prussian blood. In 1991 he made his baccalauréat at the renowned Gymnasium of the Benedictine boarding school of the monastery Einsiedeln and in 1994 he graduated from the reputable drama-school 'Circle in the Square' in NYC. He's fluent in five languages (English, French, Swiss-German, German and Italian) and is also truly cosmopolitan in his work. Taubman has starred and co-starred in over 50 feature films and TV productions. Since 1998, he has been busy working and with international success in the UK, France, Germany, Switzerland and for the USA throughout Europe and beyond. Among other credits Anatole Taubman is best known for his impressive English-language TV work in Band of Brothers (HBO), Servants (BBC), POW (ITV), Spooks VI (BBC), Waking The Dead VII - Pièta (BBC) or The Tudors II (Showtime) and established himself as a fine character actor in feature films like Mein Name is Bach (CH/D), Luther (D), Marmorera (CH), Fay Grim (USA), Snipers Valley (D), Secret Défense (F), Taken / 96 Hours (F / USA) and in 2009 Pope Joan (D), Same Same But Different (D) or in Chanel & Stravinsky (F).
data.name: Anatole Taubman

data.biography:
Єва Іонеско (фр. Eva Ionesco; 18 липня 1965, Париж) — французька кіноактриса та режисер.

У віці 5 років Єва стала улюбленою моделлю своєї матері. Ірина Йонеско робила еротичні фотографії дочки, які стали предметом дискусій, як тільки вони вперше з'явилися в 1970-х. Єва також стала моделлю для інших фотографів, таких як Жак Бурбулон.

Єва — наймолодша модель, що коли-небудь з'являлася в Playboy оголеною. Її фотографії, зроблені Жаком Бурбулоном, з'явилися в італійському виданні журналу в жовтні 1976, коли їй було 11 років. У листопаді 1978 іспанське видання Penthouse також опублікувало її фотографії.

Єва дебютувала в кіно у віці одинадцяти років, це сталось 1976-го у фільмі Романа Поланскі «Мешканець». Далі були еротичні фільми «Розпусне дитинство» і «Спермула». У 2011 році зняла фільм про своє дитинство «Моя маленька принцеса / My Little Princess».

Éva Ionesco is a French actress, film director and screenwriter. She is the daughter of Romanian-French photographer Irina Ionesco and came to international prominence as a child after being featured in her mother's works. Her film debut was at age 11 in Roman Polanski's "Le locataire".
data.name: Éva Ionesco

data.biography: Éva Ionesco é uma atriz, diretora de cinema e roteirista francesa. Ela é filha da fotógrafa romeno-francesa Irina Ionesco e ganhou destaque internacional ainda criança, depois de aparecer nos trabalhos de sua mãe. Sua estreia no cinema foi aos 11 anos, em "Le locataire", de Roman Polanski.

Eva Ionesco est une écrivaine, actrice et réalisatrice française, née le 21 mai 1965 à Paris 15e.

D'ascendance roumaine, Eva Stéphanie Nicole Ionesco naît dans le 15e arrondissement de Paris le 21 mai 1965 ou le 18 juillet 1965. Elle est la fille de la photographe Irina Ionesco et d'un père né en Hongrie, aux accointances nazies, qui restera le grand absent de sa vie.

Enfant, elle est poussée à poser fréquemment comme modèle pour les photos de sa mère et de certains photographes, parfois nue. Le caractère érotique de ces photos mettant en scène une très jeune enfant nue et érotisée provoque de nombreuses controverses. À onze ans, elle pose nue en couverture du Spiegel du 23 mai 1977. Dès l'âge de treize ans, Eva Ionesco qui se drogue à l'héroïne est retirée à la garde de sa mère et confiée à la DDASS du centre d’Orsay-Ville. L'adolescente passe un temps en maison de redressement à la suite de tentatives de vol et de fugue.

Vers seize ans, c'est pour Pierre et Gilles qu'elle apparaît dénudée sur le thème d'Adam et Ève: «Avec ses airs de baby doll, notre amie Eva Ionesco s'imposait dans le rôle d'Eva», dira plus tard le duo de photographes. Durant son enfance, elle est souvent rejetée par ses camarades, à cause de ces photos et des accoutrements que sa mère lui fait porter quotidiennement.

C'est également à cette époque qu'elle devient amie avec le futur chausseur Christian Louboutin, pour qui elle fait régulièrement des photos, mais également Vincent Darré, Paquita Paquin ou Edwige Belmore. Elle vit alors dans l'appartement de Charles Serruya où passe Philippe Krootchey, DJ à la Main bleue, une discothèque de Montreuil qu'elle fréquente. Avec tous ses amis, elle passe surtout ses nuits au Palace rue du Faubourg-Montmartre. Bien qu'alors âgée de 13 ans, Edwige la physionomiste à l'entrée de la discothèque les laisse rentrer et Fabrice Emaer ne les fait pas payer. Elle fréquente aussi Le Sept.

Toujours à la fin des années 1970, alors qu'elle est encore mineure, elle joue dans quelques films érotiques. Ceux-ci ont depuis été censurés car jugés pédopornographiques, puisqu'ils mettent en scène des mineurs dans des situations à connotation érotique.

En 1987, elle intègre la troupe du metteur en scène et réalisateur français Patrice Chéreau. Ultérieurement, Eva Ionesco est notamment connue pour ses seconds rôles sous la direction de Virginie Thévenet, Agnès Obadia, Patrick Mimouni, etc. Elle apparaît également dans le clip Night Train de Visage comme choriste, auprès de Steve Strange.

En 2011, elle réalise un film, My Little Princess, dans lequel elle met en scène sa propre enfance.

En août 2017, elle publie Innocence, un roman autobiographique.

Fin 2019, sort son deuxième long métrage intitulé Une jeunesse dorée, avec Isabelle Huppert, qui jouait déjà dans My Little Princess, Melvil Poupaud, Galatéa Bellugi et son fils Lukas Ionesco.

My Little Princess est le premier film de long métrage d’Eva Ionesco réalisé en 2011, avec Isabelle Huppert et Anamaria Vartolomei. C’est une fiction autobiographique, l’histoire d’une petite fille qui se fait photographier par sa maman, Irina Ionesco, et qui à l’âge de dix ans, se confronte à l’emprise de sa mère pour reprendre son destin en main. ...

Source: Article "Eva Ionesco" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Francis Ford Coppola (born April 7, 1939) is an American filmmaker. He is widely acclaimed as one of Hollywood's most celebrated and influential film directors. He epitomized the group of filmmakers known as the New Hollywood, which included George Lucas, Martin Scorsese, Robert Altman, Woody Allen and William Friedkin, who emerged in the early 1970s with unconventional ideas that challenged contemporary filmmaking.

He co-authored the script for Patton, winning the Academy Award in 1970. His directorial fame escalated with the release of The Godfather in 1972. The film revolutionized movie-making in the gangster genre, garnering universal laurels from critics and public alike. It went on to win three Academy Awards, including his second, which he won for Best Adapted Screenplay, and it was instrumental in cementing his position as one of the prominent American film directors. Coppola followed it with an equally successful sequel The Godfather Part II, which became the first ever sequel to win the Academy Award for Best Picture. The film received yet higher praises than its predecessor, and gave him three Academy Awards—for Best Adapted Screenplay, Best Director and Best Picture. In the same year was released The Conversation, which he directed, produced and wrote. The film went on to win the Palme d'Or at the 1974 Cannes Film Festival. His next directorial venture was Apocalypse Now in 1979, and it was as notorious for its lengthy and troubled production as it was critically acclaimed for its vivid and stark depiction of the Vietnam War. It won his second Palme d'Or at the 1979 Cannes Film Festival.

Although some of Coppola's ventures in the 1980s and early 1990s were critically lauded, Coppola's later work has not met the same level of critical and commercial success as his '70s films.
data.name: Francis Ford Coppola

data.biography:
Francis Ford Coppola (* 7. April 1939 in Detroit, Michigan) ist ein US-amerikanischer Regisseur und Produzent. Als Regisseur von Klassikern wie Der Pate und Apocalypse Now zählt er zu den bedeutendsten Filmschaffenden des US-amerikanischen Kinos.

Da er dem etablierten Studiobetrieb Hollywoods kritisch gegenüberstand, gründete Coppola 1969 das unabhängige Filmstudio American Zoetrope, wo unter anderem die ersten Filme von George Lucas verwirklicht wurden. Nachdem er mit dem Studio in finanzielle Schwierigkeiten geraten war, inszenierte Coppola ab Mitte der 1980er Jahre auch kommerziell ausgerichtete Filme mit weniger künstlerischem Anspruch.

Francis Ford Coppola (né le 7 avril 1939) est un réalisateur, producteur et scénariste américain. Il est largement reconnu comme l'un des réalisateurs les plus célèbres et les plus influents d'Hollywood. Il incarnait le groupe de cinéastes connu sous le nom de New Hollywood, qui comprenait George Lucas, Martin Scorsese, Robert Altman, Woody Allen et William Friedkin, qui a émergé au début des années 1970 avec des idées non conventionnelles qui ont défié le cinéma contemporain.

Il a co-écrit le scénario de Patton, remportant l'Oscar en 1970. Sa renommée de réalisateur s'est intensifiée avec la sortie de The Godfather en 1972. Le film a révolutionné la réalisation de films dans le genre des gangsters, recueillant les lauriers universels de la critique et du public. Il a remporté trois Oscars, dont le deuxième, qu'il a remporté pour le meilleur scénario adapté, et il a contribué à consolider sa position en tant que l'un des principaux réalisateurs américains. Coppola l'a suivi avec une suite tout aussi réussie The Godfather Part II, qui est devenue la toute première suite à remporter l'Oscar du meilleur film. Le film a reçu des éloges encore plus élevés que son prédécesseur et lui a décerné trois Oscars - pour le meilleur scénario adapté, le meilleur réalisateur et le meilleur film. La même année est sorti The Conversation, qu'il a réalisé, produit et écrit. Le film a remporté la Palme d'Or au Festival de Cannes 1974. Son prochain projet de réalisateur était Apocalypse Now en 1979, et il était aussi connu pour sa production longue et troublée que pour sa représentation vivante et frappante de la guerre du Vietnam. Il remporte sa deuxième Palme d'Or au Festival de Cannes 1979.

Bien que certaines des entreprises de Coppola dans les années 1980 et au début des années 1990 aient été saluées par la critique, le travail ultérieur de Coppola n'a pas rencontré le même niveau de succès critique et commercial que ses films des années 70. Description ci-dessus de l'article Wikipedia Francis Ford Coppola, sous licence CC-BY-SA, liste complète des contributeurs sur Wikipedia

Фрэнсис Форд Коппола - американский кинорежиссёр, сценарист и продюсер. Наиболее известен благодаря своей кинотрилогии «Крёстный отец» и фильму о вьетнамской войне «Апокалипсис сегодня». Брат Талии Шайр, дядя Кристофера Копполы, Николаса Кейджа и Джейсона Шварцмана, отец Софии Копполы и Романа Франсуа Копполы. Коппола является обладателем пяти золотых статуэток «Оскар», две из которых за «лучший адаптированный сценарий», одна за «лучший оригинальный сценарий», одна в номинации «лучший фильм» и ещё одна - за «лучшую режиссуру»; а также «Награды имени Ирвинга Тальберга». Кроме того, Коппола является двукратным обладателем «Золотой пальмовой ветви», за фильмы «Разговор» и «Апокалипсис сегодня», и лауреатом множества других кинематографических наград и номинаций.
data.name: Фрэнсис Форд Коппола

data.biography: Francis Ford Coppola (Detroit, 7 de Abril de 1939) é um produtor, roteirista e cineasta ítalo-norte-americano. Coppola é mais reconhecido internacionalmente por dirigir uma das mais aclamadas trilogias da história do cinema, "O Poderoso Chefão" e clássicos como "Apocalypse Now", "A Coversação", "Bram Stoker's Dracula", entre outros, e por escrever o roteiro do premiado Patton. É filho do compositor Carmine Coppola, e pai da cineasta Sofia Coppola, avô da também cineasta Gia Coppola, tio do ator Nicolas Cage e irmão da atriz Talia Shire. Já foi indicado 14 vezes ao Oscar e venceu por 5 vezes.

data.name: フランシス・フォード・コッポラ

data.biography:
弗朗西斯·福特·科波拉（1939年4月7日出生）是一位美国电影制片人。他被广泛认为是好莱坞最受赞誉和最有影响力的电影导演之一。他代表了被称为“新好莱坞”的电影制作人群体，其中包括乔治·卢卡斯、马丁·斯科塞斯、罗伯特·奥特曼、伍迪·艾伦和威廉·弗里德金，他们于1970年代初以非传统理念挑战当代电影制作。

他共同编写了《巴顿将军》的剧本，该片于1970年获得奥斯卡奖。随着1972年《教父》的上映，他的导演声誉进一步提升。这部电影彻底改变了黑帮题材电影制作，赢得了影评人和公众的普遍赞誉。该片赢得了三项奥斯卡奖，包括他的第二座奥斯卡奖，他凭借最佳改编剧本获得该奖项，这对巩固他作为美国著名电影导演的地位起到了关键作用。科波拉随后推出了同样成功的续集《教父2》，这部续集成为首部获得奥斯卡最佳影片奖的续集。该片获得了比前作更高的赞誉，并为他赢得了三项奥斯卡奖——最佳改编剧本、最佳导演和最佳影片。同年，他执导、制作并编剧了《对话》上映。该片随后获得了1974年戛纳电影节金棕榈奖。他的下一部导演作品是1979年的《现代启示录》，该片因其漫长且充满波折的制作过程而臭名昭著，同时因其生动而鲜明的越南战争描绘也备受好评。该片在1979年戛纳电影节上获得了他的第二个金棕榈奖。

尽管科波拉在1980年代和1990年代初的一些作品获得了评论界的高度赞誉，但他后期的作品未能达到70年代电影那样的评论和商业成功。
data.name: 弗朗西斯·科波拉

data.biography:
Франсис Форд Копола (роден на 7 април 1939 г. в Детройт) е един от най-влиятелните американски режисьори, сценаристи и продуценти, ключова фигура в движението „Новият Холивуд“.  Ранни години и образование:  Израства в италиано-американско семейство в Ню Йорк. Баща му, Кармине Копола, е известен флейтист и композитор. Като дете боледува от полиомиелит, което го приковава към леглото за дълго време – период, в който развива въображението си чрез куклен театър и домашни филми. Завършва драматично изкуство в университета Хофстра и кинорежисура в UCLA.  Кино кариера и шедьоври:

Пробив: Печели първия си „Оскар“ за сценария на „Патън“ (1970).

„Кръстникът“ (1972/1974): Променя историята на киното с трилогията за фамилия Корлеоне. Втората част го прави един от малкото режисьори, спечелили „Оскар“ за най-добър филм, режисура и сценарий за един и същ проект.

„Апокалипсис сега“ (1979): Въпреки изключително трудните снимки във Филипините, филмът се превръща в култова класика за Виетнамската война и печели „Златна палма“ в Кан.

Други важни творби: „Разговорът“, „Дракула“ и мащабният му проект от 2024 г. – „Мегалополис“.  Личен живот и бизнес

Династия: Баща е на режисьорката София Копола и чичо на актьора Никълъс Кейдж.

Предприемачество: Основава продуцентската компания American Zoetrope. Освен с кино, Копола е успешно ангажиран в производството на вино и хотелиерство.

Връзка с България: През 2005 г. заснема части от филма си „Младост без младост“ в Балчик, запленен от архитектурата и атмосферата на Двореца.
data.name: Франсис Форд Копола

data.biography:
法蘭西斯·福特·柯波拉（1939 年 4 月 7 日出生）是一位美國電影制片人。他被廣泛認為是好萊塢最受讚譽和最有影響力的電影導演之一。他代表了被稱為“新好萊塢”的電影制作人羣體，其中包括喬治·盧卡斯、馬丁·斯科塞斯、羅伯特·超人、伍迪·艾倫和威廉·弗里德金，他們於 1970 年代初以非傳統理念挑戰當代電影制作。

他共同編寫了《巴頓將軍》的劇本，該片於 1970 年獲得奧斯卡獎。隨著 1972 年《教父》的上映，他的導演聲譽進一步提升。這部電影徹底改變了黑幫題材電影制作，贏得了影評人和公眾的普遍讚譽。該片贏得了三項奧斯卡獎，包括他的第二座奧斯卡獎，他憑借最佳改編劇本獲得該獎項，這對鞏固他作為美國著名電影導演的地位起到了關鍵作用。柯波拉隨後推出了同樣成功的續集《教父 2》，這部續集成為首部獲得奧斯卡最佳影片獎的續集。該片獲得了比前作更高的讚譽，並為他贏得了三項奧斯卡獎——最佳改編劇本、最佳導演和最佳影片。同年，他執導、制作並編劇了《對話》上映。該片隨後獲得了 1974 年戛納電影節金棕櫚獎。他的下一部導演作品是 1979 年的《現代啟示錄》，該片因其漫長且充滿波折的制作過程而臭名昭著，同時因其生動而鮮明的越南戰爭描繪也備受好評。該片在 1979 年戛納電影節上獲得了他的第二個金棕櫚獎。

盡管柯波拉在 1980 年代和 1990 年代初的一些作品獲得了評論界的高度讚譽，但他後期的作品未能達到 70 年代電影那樣的評論和商業成功。
data.name: 法蘭西斯·柯波拉

data.biography:
Melissa Joan Catherine Hart (born April 18, 1976, height 5' 2" (1,57 m)) is an American actress, writer, television director, television producer, singer and businesswoman. Hart is perhaps best known for her title roles in the television series Clarissa Explains It All (1991–1994) and the live action version of Sabrina the Teenage Witch (1996–2003). Hart's career has mixed movie work with television including appearances in the popular TV shows Law and Order and That '70s Show. Since 2010, Hart has starred in the ABC Family series Melissa & Joey. Hart has been married to musician Mark Wilkerson since 2003 and together they have had two children.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Melissa Joan Hart, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia
data.name: Melissa Joan Hart

data.biography: Melissa Joan Hart (18 de abril de 1976) es una actriz, directora, productora, cantante, diseñadora de modas y empresaria estadounidense.  Es conocida por sus papeles principales en las series Clarissa Explains It All (1991–94), Sabrina the Teenage Witch (1996–03), y Melissa & Joey (2010–15).

Μελίσα Τζόαν Κάθριν Χαρτ (γεννηθείσα στις 18 Απριλίου 1976, ύψος 1,80 μ. (1,57 μ.)) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός, συγγραφέας, τηλεοπτική σκηνοθέτης, τηλεοπτική παραγωγός, τραγουδίστρια και επιχειρηματίας. Η Χαρτ είναι ίσως πιο γνωστή για τους πρωταγωνιστικούς της ρόλους στην τηλεοπτική σειρά Κλαρίσα (1991-1994) και τη ζωντανή εκδοχή της Σαμπρίνα η έφηβη μάγισσα (1996-2003). Η καριέρα της Χαρτ έχει συνδυάσει κινηματογραφικές και τηλεοπτικές δουλειές, συμπεριλαμβανομένων εμφανίσεων στις δημοφιλείς τηλεοπτικές σειρές Νόμος και τάξη και That '70s Show. Από το 2010, η Χαρτ πρωταγωνιστεί στη σειρά του ABC Family Melissa & Joey.

Jeff Wincott, a native of Toronto, has had a diverse and extensive career in the entertainment industry. After graduating from Ryerson University with a degree in Theatre, he honed his craft under the guidance of renowned acting coaches such as Stella Adler, Michael Kahn, and Eli Rill. Alongside his passion for acting, Wincott has been practicing Martial Arts since a young age, even achieving a black belt in Taekwondo. This dedication to physicality has translated into his acclaimed performances in action-packed feature films.

With an impressive repertoire of 30 films, 6 theatre roles, and nearly 150 television appearances, including a prominent role in the award-winning series Night Heat, Wincott is highly sought-after for his versatility as an actor. Whether it's portraying a hero or a villain, he effortlessly captivates audiences with his range. However, it's important not to overlook his comedic talents and his exceptional voice skills.

Beyond his acting prowess, Jeff Wincott is also a multi-talented individual. He is a skilled writer, director, and photographer, showcasing his creativity in various artistic endeavours. Moreover, he is a devoted father and husband, cherishing and embracing life and sobriety each day. Jeff Wincott truly embodies the essence of a well-rounded artist and a remarkable individual.
data.name: Jeff Wincott

data.biography: Guy Burnet was born on August 8, in England. He is an actor, known for Ray Donovan (2017), Counterpart (2019) and The Affair (2018). He is also known for his theater work in London and New York, including rave reviews for 'Murder in the first'. He's also a proficient amateur boxer.

data.biography: 刘宗基，男，香港前亚洲电视演员。1987年出道，之后一直在亚洲电视工作至2006年，首部剧集是《满清十三皇朝》的崇祯帝，之后就常常演出配角，《精武门》中霍元甲的弟子、《剑啸江湖》楚心如的师兄，还经常扮演警察，但戏份都不多，是重要的甘草演员，近年已较少演出。

data.biography: 日本女性模特、演员、主持人。 1995年，参演了电影《 拳击手阿丈 》；1998年，成为TBS电视台综艺节目《谣传的！东京杂志》的主持人；2000年，主演了都市偶像剧《 新闻最前线 》；2002年，主演青春校园偶像剧《 音符天空 》，这是其首次担任电视剧主演；2004年，因在广告中全裸出镜而引发话题；2005年，主演了古装奇幻爱情片《 甲贺忍法帖 》；2006年，主演了剧情片《 短歌 》，这是其首次主演电影；2008年10月25日，参演了家庭传记电影《 无家可归的中学生 》；2009年，主演了刑事剧《 神南署安积班 》；2011年，参与了动画电影《 手冢治虫的佛陀：美丽的红色沙漠 》的配音工作；2013年，参演了推理电影《 推理要在晚餐后 》；2014年，参演了刑侦剧《 Specialist 2 》；2015年，出演了悬疑电视剧《医生彦次郎》。2017年，出演网剧《 只有我不在的街道 》。
data.name: 黑谷友香

data.biography:
日本女性模特、演員、主持人。

1995 年，參演了電影《 拳擊手阿丈 》；1998 年，成為 TBS 電視台綜藝節目《謠傳的！東京雜誌》的主持人；2000 年，主演了都市偶像劇《 新聞最前線 》；2002 年，主演青春校園偶像劇《 音符天空 》，這是其首次擔任電視劇主演；2004 年，因在廣告中全裸出鏡而引發話題；2005 年，主演了古裝奇幻愛情片《 甲賀忍法帖 》；2006 年，主演了劇情片《 短歌 》，這是其首次主演電影；2008 年 10 月 25 日，參演了家庭傳記電影《 無家可歸的中學生 》；2009 年，主演了刑事劇《 神南署安積班 》；2011 年，參與了動畫電影《 手冢治蟲的佛陀：美麗的紅色沙漠 》的配音工作；2013 年，參演了推理電影《 推理要在晚餐後 》；2014 年，參演了刑偵劇《 Specialist 2 》；2015 年，出演了懸疑電視劇《醫生彥次郎》。2017 年，出演網劇《 只有我不在的街道 》。
data.name: 黑谷友香

data.overview: Ashley Tisdale trong vai cô bé vai chính Mandy-một cô gái bình thường trong trường trung học Nottingham. Nhưng không hiểu sao Mandy lại có một cuộc hẹn với chàng trai hot nhất trường Drew Patterson. Và nhiều rắc rối đã nảy sinh từ đó. Để đến được cuộc hẹn Mandy phải nhờ sự giúp đỡ từ những người bạn thân. Họ cùng nhau tìm cách vượt qua sự cấm cản của bố Mandy và cô người tình cũ. Cuối cùng, Mandy đã nhận ra sự nổi tiếng đến và đi như một cơn gió nhưng những người bạn thân vẫn sẽ mãi ở bên ta.
data.title: Hẹn Hò Cùng Hot Boy

data.overview: Cung Thiếu Gia (Tạ Đình Phong) và Lão Ba (Trương Gia Huy) là hai tân bộ đầu của huyện Bạch Mã. Mặc dù có chút võ công nhưng cả hai lại không có cơ hội vụt sáng mà suốt ngày chỉ loay hoay với việc giặt giũ và nấu nướng trong nha huyện. Cho đến một ngày nọ, huyện Bạch Mã xảy ra một vụ án long trời lở đất. Chỉ trong một đêm, gia đình Trương lão gia bị rơi vào thảm họa diệt môn. Bức tượng quý giá “Ngọc Quan âm” của Trương gia cũng bị đánh cướp. Quyết tâm khám phá vụ án, Cung thiếu gia và lão Ba đã lên đường đến Quán Trọ Thần Tài – một quán trọ thần bí nằm trong sa mạc mà chủ nhân của nó là Ngọc Linh Lung (Lưu Dương) – một cô gái cực kỳ quyến rũ...
data.title: Quán trọ thần tài

data.biography: Mark was born in Horne, Surrey to farmer and amateur entertainer Bernard Kempner, and former land-girl Mary Kempner. He went to Michael Hall school, and excelled in particular, in the many drama classes.  Mark worked on the family farm until meeting wife Anna at 18. They married in 1982. They have two children, both of whom are also professional actors.  Soon after leaving school, Mark worked on a Kibbutz in Israel for a year and in that time, started up a touring comedy drama group. The group toured other Kibbutz's performing comedy sketches.
data.name: Mark Kempner

data.biography:
Yves Jacques OC (born 10 May 1956) is a Canadian film, television and stage actor.

Jacques was born in Quebec City in 1956. He studied theatre at the Cégep de Saint-Hyacinthe, and began acting on stage in both Quebec City and Montreal. He became more widely known to film and television audiences beginning in 1981 as a sketch performer in Télévision de Radio-Canada's annual Bye Bye New Year's Eve variety special, and soon began appearing more widely in film and television roles. To international audiences, he is best known as Claude, the gay academic in Denys Arcand's The Decline of the American Empire and The Barbarian Invasions. On stage, he is noted for originating the role of Lydie-Anne in the premiere of Michel Marc Bouchard's play Lilies.

He has been in several movies by French filmmaker Claude Miller, including Of Woman and Magic and Little Lili. His fame has continued to grow with films and theatrical productions in both France and Quebec. Since 2001, he has toured the world in two shows by Robert Lepage, Far Side of the Moon (La Face cachée de la lune) and Le Projet Andersen, where he played all the roles. Since 2018, he has appeared regularly in Mathieu Quesnel’s theatrical creations. More recently, he played in Aline by Valérie Lemercier, in Maria by Alec Pronovost, and in Chloé Robichaud’s Les jours heureux. In 2022, Yves Jacques played in Martin Villeneuve's The 12 Tasks of Imelda (Les 12 travaux d'Imelda), co-starring playwright Robert Lepage and actress-signer Ginette Reno.

He was named Chevalier de l’Ordre des Arts et des Lettres by the Ministère de la Culture et de la Communication de France in February 2001, and was appointed an Officer of the Order of Canada in 2009, for his performances in theatre, television and film, in Canada and abroad.

He is openly gay.

Source: Article "Yves Jacques" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.
data.name: Yves Jacques

data.biography:
Yves Jacques est un acteur québécois, né le 10 mai 1956 à Québec (Canada).

Il joue depuis 2001 en tournée mondiale deux spectacles de Robert Lepage, La face cachée de la lune et Le Projet Andersen, dont il interprète seul les personnages. En 2014, il élargit sa palette au théâtre avec le rôle de Dubois dans Les Fausses Confidences de Marivaux en compagnie d'Isabelle Huppert qui joue Araminte.
data.name: Yves Jacques

data.biography:
Yves Jacques est un acteur québécois, né le 10 mai 1956 à Québec (Canada).

Yves Jacques mène parallèlement une carrière au Québec et en France, tant au cinéma qu'au théâtre. Il a tourné dans cinq films du réalisateur québécois Denys Arcand, dont Le Déclin de l'empire américain, Jésus de Montréal et Les Invasions barbares, ainsi que dans sept films du cinéaste français Claude Miller. Parmi les autres cinéastes avec lesquels Yves Jacques a travaillé, on peut citer Xavier Dolan, Jean-Paul Rappeneau, Olivier Dahan et Martin Scorsese.

Il a joué en tournée mondiale, à partir de 2001, deux spectacles de Robert Lepage, La Face cachée de la Lune et Le Projet Andersen, dont il interprète seul les personnages. En 2014, il élargit sa palette au théâtre avec le rôle de Dubois dans Les Fausses Confidences de Marivaux, mise en scène Luc Bondy, en compagnie d'Isabelle Huppert qui joue Araminte - au Théâtre de l'Odéon et en tournée internationale. Simultanément, il interprète également, le même personnage dans une version cinématographique. Il considère que son personnage d'enseignant homosexuel dans Le Déclin de l'empire américain lui a permis d'assumer lui-même son homosexualité. Il a été nommé Chevalier de l’Ordre des Arts et des Lettres par le Ministère de la Culture et de la Communication de France en février 2001, et Officier de l’Ordre du Canada depuis 2009, pour ses interprétations au théâtre, à la télévision et au cinéma, au Canada comme à l’étranger.

En 2022, on a pu le voir dans la comédie dramatique Les 12 travaux d'Imelda de Martin Villeneuve, aux côtés de Robert Lepage, Ginette Reno et Michel Barrette.

Le cinéaste Claude Miller, qui fit appel à lui pour le rôle du docteur Fich dans son téléfilm La Chambre des magiciennes (2000), et celui de George dans son film Voyez comme ils dansent (2011), a dit de lui: «Yves Jacques est l’un des plus grands acteurs du monde, c’est une grande vedette au Québec. Pour moi, il est une espèce d’Alec Guinness ou de Peter Sellers d’aujourd’hui, ou de Geoffrey Rush. Sa culture d’acteur anglo-saxonne est merveilleuse, il est capable de passer du drame à la comédie avec un grand sens du rythme, de la musique.»

Source: Article "Yves Jacques" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.
Actor Joe Slaughter caught the attention of audiences in 2010, when he joined the cast of the third movie in the Step Up dance movie franchise, Step Up 3D, playing the role of Julien.

data.biography:
Razane Jammal is a British-Lebanese actress who is fluent in English, French, and Arabic. She has had enormous success both at home and abroad and has played a variety of roles throughout her career, acting in many different dialects.

In the Arab world, Razane is best known for her portrayal of Maggie Maccaleb in Netflix's first Egyptian original series Paranormal (2020) alongside Egyptian actors Ahmed Amin and Ayah Samaha. The show, inspired by the wildly successful books by the late Dr. Ahmed Khalid Tawfik, is directed by Amr Salama and Majid Al Ansari. She has also starred opposite legendary actresses Hend Sabry in MBC’s comedy series Embratoreyet Meen (Who’s Empire?) (2014), Youssra and Kosai Khauli on the second season of the period show Saraya Abedeen (Abdeen Palace) (2014), and Taim Hassan in her first Pan-Arab series Ana (2021) as Judy. She also played Dr. Iman in the Shahid original show Al Shak (Doubt) (2021) alongside Saudi actress Fatima Al Banawi.

Jammal has also made a name for herself in the international film industry with her diverse roles in French, British and American projects, three of which have participated at the Cannes Film Festival: Cruel Summer (2012) by Kanye West, critically acclaimed and award-winning American rapper and one of the most influential hip-hop musicians of all time, Une Histoire de Fou (2014) by Robert Guediguian, and Carlos (2010) by Olivier Assayas, which received a Golden Globe in 2011.

Her other projects include A Walk Among the Tombstones (2014) alongside actor Liam Neeson with The Queen's Gambit’s director Scott Franks, the American series Berlin Station (2016) with Rhys Ifans, Richard Jenkins, and Michelle Forbes, Channel 4’s mini-series, Chimerica (2019) with actor Alessandro Nivola, and Eric and Quentin’s French comedy Bad Buzz (2016).

In 2022, Razane will appear as Lyta Hall in DC Comics' highly anticipated The Sandman on Netflix’s global platform and in Marwan Hamed's star-studded film, Kira & El Gin.

Razane, who was born and bred in Lebanon, found her passion for acting early on and started drama classes at school when she was 6 years old. She then started modeling and acting in commercials at the age of 15, and by the age of 17, she had already traveled across the globe to appear on numerous covers and in many video clips, commercials, and short films. She then traveled to the UK and enrolled at King’s College London to study business while taking summer acting workshops in Paris, Los Angeles, and New York. After graduation, Razane got her first break on the Golden Globe-winning series Carlos, marking the beginning of her acting career.

During her spare time, Razane enjoys photography, drawing, and writing. She is a frequent student at Heatherley’s School of Art in London and is hoping to one day exhibit her works. She is also in the middle of publishing her first children’s book, ‘Lulu & Blu’, and is preparing her first short film.
data.name: Razane Jammal

data.biography: ممثلة وعارضة لبنانية، بدأت مسيرتها في مجال التمثيل منذ أن كانت في السادسة من عمرها، كما عملت عارضة منذ سن الخامسة عشر وشاركت في العمل في عدد كبير من الإعلانات، ثم نالت فرصة كبيرة من مشاركتها من خلال المسلسل التليفزيوني القصير (Carlos)، كما شاركت في الدراما التليفزيونية المصرية من خلال مسلسل (امبراطورية مين؟).

data.biography: Shum Wai (Chinese: 沈威) was born on 1 May 1951 in Hong Kong. He was an actor and writer, known for Long Arm of the Law (1984), Triad Story (1990) and City Warriors (1988). He died on 9 June 2022 in Hong Kong.
data.name: Shum Wai

data.biography: 沈威（1951年－2022年6月9日），香港前男演员，1970年代开始出演电影，但并未崭露头角。直到1984年参演由麦当雄执导的《省港旗兵》，饰演两面派阿泰一角。凭借其在片中的出色发挥，获得1985年香港电影金像奖最佳男配角奖项，从而一举成名。但沈威此后并未因此而走红，其后仍长期在各类影片中担任配角或反派角色，虽亦曾涉足监制、编剧等幕后工作，但成绩都未如理想。1990年代中期，沈威曾短期加入无线电视，演出数部电视剧。2000年代，沈威淡出影视圈。2022年6月9日，金像奖最佳男配角，演员沈威去世，享年71岁。
data.name: 沈威

data.name: 沈威
